description_long: This is a compact, rectangular microwave oven with a predominantly white exterior and a slightly curved, dark-tinted window on the front door. The front panel features two large, round dials and a vertical row of small, triangular buttons, all positioned to the right of the door. The top and sides of the microwave are solid white with a series of rectangular ventilation slots on the top surface for heat dissipation. The back panel is more utilitarian, displaying a large information label, additional vents, and a power cord connection. The door handle is integrated into the right edge of the door, forming a subtle vertical grip. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for placement in kitchens, break rooms, or urban communal spaces.
description: A white, rectangular microwave oven with a curved dark window, two dials, and a vertical row of buttons on the front panel. Top and back surfaces feature ventilation slots and a large information label.
description_view_0: The left side of the microwave, showing a plain white surface with no visible features except for the top ventilation slots.
description_view_1: The front view displays the curved dark window, two large dials, a vertical row of buttons, and the integrated door handle on the right edge.
description_view_2: The right side of the microwave, similar to the left, is plain white with only the top ventilation slots visible.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a large information label, multiple ventilation openings, and the power cord connection.
attribute_brand_logo: A small brand logo is present on the lower right corner of the front panel, just below the dials. It is subtle, printed in gray, and does not dominate the design.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the right side of the front face, featuring two large, vertically stacked round dials and a vertical row of small, triangular buttons above the dials. The panel is clearly labeled, with each control separated for ease of use.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is integrated into the right edge of the door, forming a vertical, recessed grip that is part of the door's molded plastic frame. It is subtle and blends with the door's contour, providing a comfortable pull mechanism.
attribute_vent_placement: Ventilation slots are located on the top surface in two parallel rows and on the back panel in a grid pattern. The vents are rectangular and evenly spaced, ensuring adequate airflow.
attribute_window_presence: A large, curved, dark-tinted transparent window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and allowing visibility into the microwave's interior.
